# Third-party source imports

No third-party source has been imported yet. Keep imported projects in separate
subdirectories using their upstream layout, and record the exact source revision,
archive checksum, license, retained paths, and local patches in `UPSTREAM.toml`.

The initial candidates and retained responsibilities are listed in `DESIGN.md`.
Imports must build only through Xmin's CMake targets; do not make the normal build
discover equivalent libraries from the host.
